decisions.decision: web-sys Element needs dyn_into::<SvgsvgElement>() for get_bounding_client_rect() in SVG hit-testing
decisions.rationale: Discovered during 15-02 implementation — web_sys::Element doesn't expose getBoundingClientRect directly; need SvgsvgElement + SvgGraphicsElement + DomRect features in Cargo.toml
